description:
M.E.G.A.L.A.M.O.U.R

"The strongest Enemy stands in your way."

Wait... NEVERMIND! They're your girlfriend and you two are chilling out on the couch. She's 22 btw. (Side note she really fucking hates spiders.)

Eighth human POV! You two have been dating for four years! (Technically Shifty POV but whatever)

(I got a little too used to making fight bots over and over again OOPS.)

((I was checking out Storyfell Chara tracks... One of them was called SUCCUBUS. I don't think I'm gonna emotionally recover from that for a bit.))
